author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Single-source Plan workflow examples across plugin docs

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: Plan workflow examples are repeated across plugins/pm-claude/skills/pm-planner/SKILL.md:114-143, plugins/pm-codex/skills/pm-native/SKILL.md:59-75, and plugins/pm-claude/commands/pm-planner.md:53-69. The snippets describe pm_plan purpose and JSON lifecycle examples for create/add-step/update/complete/decision/approve/materialize/show/resume, but diverge by harness, included subcommands, and example fields. Closed pm-aqat exposed Plan workflow surfaces but does not track deduplicating copied plugin examples.

A canonical Plan workflow recipe exists in docs or shared plugin reference; Claude/Codex skills and commands keep only harness-specific deltas and link to the recipe; examples stay valid against current plan contracts; docs-skills gate and focused plugin docs checks pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: pm search 'Plan workflow examples pm_plan planner skill command duplicated plugin docs' found closed Plan implementation items and no active docs-example dedup item.

message: Create duplicate-audit finding for Plan workflow examples
